title: Web Directory Enumeration Detected
description: Detects directory and file enumeration attempts via high volume of 404 responses to common admin/config paths. OWASP A01:2021 Broken Access Control.
query: ('Log Source' = 'OCI Load Balancer Access Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Load Balancer Access Logs') and (('Response Code' = '404') and (('Request URL' like '*/admin*' or 'Request URL' like '*/administrator*' or 'Request URL' like '*/wp-admin*' or 'Request URL' like '*/wp-login*' or 'Request URL' like '*/phpmyadmin*' or 'Request URL' like '*/phpMyAdmin*' or 'Request URL' like '*/.env*' or 'Request URL' like '*/.git*' or 'Request URL' like '*/.svn*' or 'Request URL' like '*/config*' or 'Request URL' like '*/backup*' or 'Request URL' like '*/db*' or 'Request URL' like '*/database*' or 'Request URL' like '*/debug*' or 'Request URL' like '*/console*' or 'Request URL' like '*/swagger*' or 'Request URL' like '*/api-docs*' or 'Request URL' like '*/actuator*' or 'Request URL' like '*/graphql*' or 'Request URL' like '*/graphiql*' or 'Request URL' like '*/server-status*' or 'Request URL' like '*/server-info*' or 'Request URL' like '*/robots.txt*' or 'Request URL' like '*/sitemap.xml*' or 'Request URL' like '*/crossdomain.xml*' or 'Request URL' like '*/.well-known*' or 'Request URL' like '*/composer.json*' or 'Request URL' like '*/package.json*' or 'Request URL' like '*/web.config*' or 'Request URL' like '*/Dockerfile*')))
falsepositives: Web crawlers and search engine bots
